description: Phase 2 - Authentication with Amazon Cognito: Add Cognito User Pool with Google OAuth 2.0 (Gmail SSO) as federated identity provider to the CDK infrastructure. Create a Cognito stack that provisions the User Pool, App Client, and hosted UI domain. Output the necessary configuration (User Pool ID, App Client ID, domain) for the frontend to integrate. Cognito Free Tier: 50,000 MAUs.
steps: Create lib/auth-stack.ts in infra/ with: Cognito User Pool (email as primary sign-in, self sign-up enabled), User Pool App Client (SPA flow with PKCE, no client secret), Google as federated identity provider (configurable client ID/secret via CDK context or SSM parameters), Hosted UI domain (cognito prefix domain or custom domain), callback/logout URLs configurable for dev/prod environments
Add CfnOutput exports for: UserPoolId, UserPoolClientId, CognitoDomain, IdentityPoolId (if needed)

Create src/auth/ directory in the frontend with: auth.ts (Cognito configuration, token management using @aws-amplify/auth or a lightweight OIDC client), authStore.ts (Pinia store for auth state: user, isAuthenticated, login/logout actions)
Install necessary frontend dependency: aws-amplify (or a lighter alternative like oidc-client-ts) in the root package.json
Create src/composables/useAuth.ts composable that wraps the auth store for use in components
Update src/router/index.ts to add optional auth guards (user can still use the app without login, but some features require auth)
Create src/components/LoginButton.vue and src/components/UserMenu.vue for the auth UI
acceptance_criteria: CDK auth stack compiles and synthesizes valid CloudFormation with Cognito User Pool and Google IdP
Frontend auth module exports login, logout, getCurrentUser, isAuthenticated utilities
Auth Pinia store integrates with Vue reactivity system
Router guards allow unauthenticated access to quiz but protect user-specific routes
LoginButton and UserMenu components render without errors
npm test passes (existing tests not broken, new auth components have basic tests)
findings: CDK AuthStack synths cleanly with optional Google IdP (only configured when credentials provided via context/env). Frontend auth uses zero external dependencies - custom OIDC/PKCE implementation with native fetch and Web Crypto API. All new tests pass. Pre-existing questionStore test failure (getQuestionById) continues as documented in FEAT-001. Build produces properly code-split auth chunks (~0.68KB for AuthCallback, ~1.32KB for UserProfile). Router type augmentation requires 'export {}' before 'declare module vue-router' to avoid shadowing vue-router's own exports.
